examples: He reverentially returned the novel to a glass-fronted bookcase.
The children hold their palms together reverentially to receive my offerings of candy.
"Her name is always brought up, almost reverentially, in tech circles, " says Sarahjane Sacchetti, communications head at question-and-answer site Formspring.
That "responsible gun owner" politicians talk about, the one who reverentially passes down to his son the bolt-action rifle his father gave him?
